states.name: Levinrachnid
states.title: Levinrachnid
states.description: While deadly, these electricity-infused spiders are hunted for their energy-producing glands, which are used as high-end lighting for city streets and wealthy homes.

states.name: Levinwidow
states.title: Levinwidow
states.description: A folk parable tells of a farmer seduced to a lake by a mermaid. A Levinwidow electrocuted the mermaid and saved the farmer woman. Its meaning has been lost with time.
